title: Heroes & Villains
description: A modpack about heroes and villains, fantasy, suits and powerups!
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7655e8189d0b7d2c836236dd1bb1c759406f62e5.png)

![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66a41a6452a4ffdcde6993002122feec0107195e.png)

This modpack adds superhero **suits, powers, and missions**, letting you play as **heroes or villains** with unique abilities. 

It includes Timeless Heroes and Heroes of Envell for custom suits and abilities, plus performance and visual mods like ModernFix, FerriteCore, and ImmediatelyFast for smoother gameplay.

Visual quality is improved with Photon, Solas, and Complementary Shaders, along with mods like Entity Model Features, Not Enough Animations, and Rethinking Voxels for more detail and realism.

Play solo or with friends, explore the world, fight enemies, and build your own superhero legacy — whether you save the world or rule it is up to you.
